insights: Resolved naming conflicts: Customer_ID and CustID unified to customer_id
Eliminated PII duplication: email and phone removed from transactional tables
Reduced storage costs: metadata attributes centralized in master entities
Enabled unified customer view: single canonical customer_id across CRM and ERP
Improved data governance: PII fields isolated and masked in customer_master
Normalized model: transactional data references master entities via foreign keys
Platform compatibility: designed for Databricks with timestamp-based partitioning support
Schema consistency: enforced snake_case naming convention across all entities
